'''mangate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wallah|wallah]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ng-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wallah|wallah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mangate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:mangate|mangate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mangatesher|mangatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mangatesherĂ«m|mangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mangatero|mangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mangateshĂ«|mangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mangateshĂ«m|mangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimangatero|gokimangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimangateshĂ«|gokimangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimangateshĂ«m|gokimangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomangankerom|gomangankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomangankeshĂ«|gomangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomangankeshĂ«m|gomangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomangankeya|gomangankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mangaterom|mangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mangatemu|mangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mangateya|mangateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimangaterom|gokimangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimangatemu|gokimangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimangateya|gokimangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:mangangate|mangangate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mangangatesher|mangangatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mangangatesherĂ«m|mangangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mangangatero|mangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mangangateshĂ«|mangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mangangateshĂ«m|mangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimangangatero|gokimangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimangangateshĂ«|gokimangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimangangateshĂ«m|gokimangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomangangankerom|gomangangankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomangangankeshĂ«|gomangangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomangangankeshĂ«m|gomangangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomangangankeya|gomangangankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mangangaterom|mangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mangangatemu|mangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mangangateya|mangangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimangangaterom|gokimangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimangangatemu|gokimangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimangangateya|gokimangangateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:mĂŠngĂŠte|mĂŠngĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mĂŠngĂŠtesher|mĂŠngĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m|mĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠngĂŠtero|mĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|mĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|mĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠngĂŠtero|gokimĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|gokimĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|gokimĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomĂŠngĂŠnkerom|gomĂŠngĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«|gomĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gomĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomĂŠngĂŠnkeya|gomĂŠngĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠngĂŠterom|mĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠngĂŠtemu|mĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mĂŠngĂŠteya|mĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠngĂŠterom|gokimĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠngĂŠtemu|gokimĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimĂŠngĂŠteya|gokimĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:mafngafte|mafngafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mafngaftesher|mafngaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafngaftesherĂ«m|mafngaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafngaftero|mafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mafngafteshĂ«|mafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafngafteshĂ«m|mafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafngaftero|gokimafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimafngafteshĂ«|gokimafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafngafteshĂ«m|gokimafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomafngafnkerom|gomafngafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomafngafnkeshĂ«|gomafngafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomafngafnkeshĂ«m|gomafngafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomafngafnkeya|gomafngafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafngafterom|mafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafngaftemu|mafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mafngafteya|mafngafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafngafterom|gokimafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafngaftemu|gokimafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimafngafteya|gokimafngafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
